# Python cache
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]

# Jupyter
.ipynb_checkpoints/

# Environments
.venv/
venv/
env/
conda-env/

# IDE/editor
.vscode/
.idea/

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Logs and temp files
*.log
*.tmp
*.swp

# Python tooling caches
.pytest_cache/
.mypy_cache/

# Local notebook exports and generated files
*.html~
